header.title: PDF Generators
header.description: Bulk-generate PDFs for responses matching a saved filter, using one of your PDF templates

empty.title: No PDF generators yet
empty.description: Create a generator to bulk-generate PDFs for responses matching a filter.
empty.viewerDescription: No PDF generators have been created for this form yet.

limits.generatorLimitReached: This form has reached the maximum of {{max}} PDF generators. Delete one to create another.

results.title: Generated PDFs — {{name}}
results.description: Every response this generator has produced a PDF for. Regenerating a response replaces its file here (no version history).
results.empty: No PDFs generated yet. Run this generator, or wait for auto-run, to produce some.

deleteDialog.title: Delete PDF generator?
deleteDialog.description: "{{name}}" and its generated PDFs will be permanently deleted. This cannot be undone.

editor.columnNameDescription: The header shown for this generator's download column in the Responses table.
editor.columnNameLockedDescription: Locked — column names can only be set once and cannot be changed afterward.
editor.filenameFieldNone: None — use a generic file name
editor.filenameFieldDescription: Pick a form field to name each downloaded PDF after (e.g. the respondent's name). A random string is always appended to keep every file unique.
editor.autoRunLabel: Automatically generate for new matching responses
editor.autoRunDescription: When enabled, a PDF is generated automatically whenever a new response matches this filter.

toasts.createdDescription: Your PDF generator has been created.
toasts.deletedDescription: The PDF generator has been deleted.
toasts.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

responseAction.dialogDescription: Pick a saved generator to download this response's PDF.

formNotFound.title: Form not found
formNotFound.description: The form you're looking for doesn't exist or you don't have access to it.

generatorNotFound.title: Generator not found
generatorNotFound.description: This PDF generator doesn't exist or you don't have access to it.
